response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song segment ('Koi wa Sensou'). 2. The JSON provides the correct song lyrics. 3. The dialogue segment follows the song, which is not in the JSON; I have transcribed it manually from the audio. 4. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts, ensuring no early cutoffs or cross-pause merging.

subtitles.original: 日差しはかげり
subtitles.english: The sunlight casts a shadow

subtitles.original: 夕暮れは色を変えていく
subtitles.english: The twilight changes color

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 世界がにじんで
subtitles.english: Ah, the world blurs

subtitles.original: それでも好きでいられるかなんて
subtitles.english: Even so, will I still be able to love you?

subtitles.original: わかってる
subtitles.english: I know

subtitles.original: けどどうすればいいの
subtitles.english: But what should I do?

subtitles.original: どうしたら どうすれば
subtitles.english: What should I do? What should I do?

subtitles.original: バカだな わたし…
subtitles.english: I'm a fool, I...

subtitles.original: 始めるのよ
subtitles.english: It's starting now

subtitles.original: これは 戦争
subtitles.english: This is war

subtitles.original: 嬉しそうなキミをみるなんて
subtitles.english: I see you looking so happy

subtitles.original: 切なる恋
subtitles.english: This painful love

subtitles.original: それは罪
subtitles.english: It's a sin

subtitles.original: 見せてあげる わたしの想いを
subtitles.english: I'll show you, all of my feelings

subtitles.original: 叫んでみたメガホンは壊れてたの
subtitles.english: I shouted, but the megaphone is broken

subtitles.original: どれだけ背伸びしたって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I stand on my tiptoes

subtitles.original: 君の視界に入らない
subtitles.english: I'll never enter your world

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 いつのまにか晴れた空
subtitles.english: Ah, before I knew it, the sky cleared up

subtitles.original: 全然似合わない
subtitles.english: It doesn't fit at all

subtitles.original: 気持ちが抑えられなくて
subtitles.english: I can't hold back my feelings

subtitles.original: どうしたら どうすれば
subtitles.english: What should I do? What should I do?

subtitles.original: 泣いてなんか ないんだからね
subtitles.english: I'm not crying, you know

subtitles.original: 大好き
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: たたかうのよ
subtitles.english: I'll fight

subtitles.original: ハートを撃て
subtitles.english: I'll shoot my heart through

subtitles.original: 手段なんて選んでられない
subtitles.english: I can't choose my methods

subtitles.original: スカートひらり見せつけるのよ
subtitles.english: I'll show off my fluttering skirt

subtitles.original: 君の視線奪ってみせるの
subtitles.english: I'll steal your gaze and show it to you

subtitles.original: 迎撃 用意
subtitles.english: Battle stations, ready

subtitles.original: 戦況は未だ不利なのです
subtitles.english: The war situation is still unfavorable

subtitles.original: 恋は 盲目
subtitles.english: Love is blind

subtitles.original: 君の口づけで目が覚めるの!
subtitles.english: I'll wake up with a kiss from you!

subtitles.original: Oh... I'm sorry Chattini... I tried my best...
subtitles.english: Oh... I'm sorry Chattini... I tried my best...

subtitles.original: ...but I only got two.
subtitles.english: ...but I only got two.

subtitles.original: Noooo... my jetpack...
subtitles.english: Noooo... my jetpack...

subtitles.original: Ah! The jetpack exploded!
subtitles.english: Ah! The jetpack exploded!

subtitles.original: I'm sorry Chattini.
subtitles.english: I'm sorry Chattini.

subtitles.original: Actually, I have a present for all of you!
subtitles.english: Actually, I have a present for all of you!

subtitles.original: Present? I wonder what it is? Is it a cucumber?
subtitles.english: Present? I wonder what it is? Is it a cucumber?

subtitles.original: Ah, mmm-mmm. Let me tell you.
subtitles.english: Ah, mmm-mmm. Let me tell you.

subtitles.original: That's the best! It's not a jetpack but it's really nice!
subtitles.english: That's the best! It's not a jetpack but it's really nice!

subtitles.original: Hehe! Thanks Chattini!
subtitles.english: Hehe! Thanks Chattini!

subtitles.original: Well then, before I reveal the best present ever...
subtitles.english: Well then, before I reveal the best present ever...

subtitles.original: ...I've got an announcement to make!
subtitles.english: ...I've got an announcement to make!

subtitles.original: Tada!
subtitles.english: Tada!

subtitles.original: Raora Panthera Pencil Case & Keychain!
subtitles.english: Raora Panthera Pencil Case & Keychain!

subtitles.original: Yes, this is a cute pencil case with me in a Chattino costume.
subtitles.english: Yes, this is a cute pencil case with me in a Chattino costume.

subtitles.original: So I hope you guys can bring it everywhere. School, in the office, literally everywhere.
subtitles.english: So I hope you guys can bring it everywhere. School, in the office, literally everywhere.

subtitles.original: So please don't miss it out, okay?
subtitles.english: So please don't miss it out, okay?

subtitles.original: Ah, that was such a fun 3D showcase with a lot of things happening.
subtitles.english: Ah, that was such a fun 3D showcase with a lot of things happening.

subtitles.original: Did everyone have fun? Chattini, did you guys have fun?
subtitles.english: Did everyone have fun? Chattini, did you guys have fun?

subtitles.original: Ah! Thank you! I'm so happy to hear that. Thank you!
subtitles.english: Ah! Thank you! I'm so happy to hear that. Thank you!

subtitles.original: Since you guys had a great time with me today, I'm so happy. Thank you!
subtitles.english: Since you guys had a great time with me today, I'm so happy. Thank you!

subtitles.original: I'll keep doing my best to bring fun streams and more 3D live performances like this one today, okay?
subtitles.english: I'll keep doing my best to bring fun streams and more 3D live performances like this one today, okay?

subtitles.original: I appreciate you guys so much. Thank you Chattini for all your support.
subtitles.english: I appreciate you guys so much. Thank you Chattini for all your support.

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
